description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, cylindrical handle featuring a wood-like brown core and black grip sections, accented by turquoise rings and metallic highlights. The axe head is composed of two large, symmetrical, crescent-shaped steel blades with a hammered texture, each terminating in a sharp point. Both the top and bottom of the handle are capped with conical steel spikes, enhancing its aggressive appearance. The handle is wrapped with turquoise cord or bands for improved grip and visual contrast. Gold-colored text or decorative markings are visible along the upper section of the handle, adding a unique, personalized touch. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for display or use in urban-themed fantasy or historical settings.
description: A double-bladed battle axe with a wooden handle, turquoise grip accents, and steel blades, featuring decorative gold markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows both crescent-shaped blades, turquoise grip bands, and gold markings on the handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin blade profile and the cylindrical handle with turquoise rings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetry of the blades and the full length of the handle with its grip accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the blade thickness and the continuation of the turquoise and gold handle details.
attribute_handle_type: Cylindrical, straight wooden handle with black grip sections and turquoise cord wraps; ergonomic and non-curved.
attribute_blade_design: Double crescent-shaped steel blades with pointed tips, hammered texture, and symmetrical geometry; no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting with visible integration of blade and handle, no traditional wedge or pin visible.
attribute_visible_markings_or_labels: gold script or decorative text on handle
